song_name: I Can Love You Like That

versions.song_name: I Can Love You Like That
versions.version_description: Full chord tab of song. Note the key modulation in final chorus from E to F, though its a simple 1 fret move.

versions.song_name: I Can Love You Like That
versions.version_description: Specific, corrected chords with capo which will transpose to correct key, relabeled and fully timed sections, corrected lyrics, appropriate strum pattern.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Sittin On The Dock Of The Bay

content:
------------------------------------------------------
        "I Can Love You Like That" - All 4 One
              http://www.all-4-one.com/
------------------------------------------------------
Tabbed by: Justin Riray
Youtube:   http://www.youtube.com/JustinRiray

This is in the exact key that All 4 One did it in,
but I play a couple chords differently. It still sounds
great on an acoustic guitar.


CAPO 6 standard


[tab][ch]A[/ch] [ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]*
*it sounds nicer if you replace E with Dm sometimes[/tab]

[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]
They  read you Cinderella,   [/tab]
[tab] [ch]C#m[/ch]  
You  hoped it would come true,   [/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]  
That  one day your prince charming,   [/tab]
[tab] [ch]E[/ch]  
would come , rescue you.   [/tab]
[tab] [ch]A[/ch]  
You l ike romantic movies,   [/tab]
[tab] [ch]C#m[/ch]  
You  never could forget,   [/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]                                  [ch]E[/ch]  
The  way you felt when romeo kissed Juliet,   [/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bm[/ch]                               [ch]D[/ch]  
And  all this time that you've been waiting,   [/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bm[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]  
 You don't have to wait no more.   [/tab]
  
   
[tab]                        [ch]A[/ch]  
I can love you like that,   [/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]C#m[/ch]  
I would make you my world,   [/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]D[/ch]  
Move heaven and earth,   [/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]E[/ch]  
If you were my girl,   [/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]A[/ch]  
I would give you my heart,   [/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]C#m[/ch]  
Be all that you need,   [/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]D[/ch]                           [ch]E[/ch]  
Show you you're everything that's precious to me,   [/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Bm[/ch]    [ch]Dm[/ch]
If you give me a chance, I can love you like that   [/tab]
